scenario: Unrelated chatter interleaved with the real root-cause finding.
question: What caused the duplicate welcome emails?
turns: some users get duplicate welcome emails
Looking into it. By the way, did standup move to 10am?
The signup handler isn't idempotent: a client retry after a slow response re-runs the whole handler, including the email send. There's no dedup key on the email job.
makes sense. also can you review my other PR later
Sure. To confirm the email bug: root cause is the missing idempotency key on signup, so retries duplicate the email send.
